user_intent_preservation.original_goal: Implement 3-phase PWM motor control on TC387
user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Drive a 3-phase inverter using GTM TOM1, Cluster_1 in center-aligned mode at 20 kHz with 1 us rising/falling dead time; complementary HS/LS outputs active-high; synchronous start and synchronous duty updates. Map pins U: HS=P02.0, LS=P02.7; V: HS=P02.1, LS=P02.4; W: HS=P02.2, LS=P02.5. Initialize duties U=25%, V=50%, W=75% and update by 10% every 500 ms with wrap rule: if (duty + step) >= 100 then duty = 0 + step. Enable GTM with clock guard (check CLC.DISS; set/verify GCLK at module frequency; set FXCLK0 source to GCLK; enable IFXGTM_CMU_CLKEN_FXCLK). Provide an empty IfxGtm_periodEventFunction(). Add a GTM ATOM0 CH0 ISR (priority 20, CPU0) to toggle LED P13.0 at 2 Hz.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Migrate from IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl to the unified high-level IfxGtm_Pwm. Enable GTM and FXCLK clocks, configure TOM1 TGC1 channels as three complementary pairs with center-aligned mode and 1 us dead-time, set polarity active-high, map TOUT pins using the TC38x_516 pin map helper, start channels synchronously, then update duties synchronously using the array-based duty update API. Pace duty updates every 500 ms using STM ticks. Configure ATOM0 CH0 to generate a periodic ISR to toggle P13.0 at 2 Hz.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: Unified high-level GTM PWM driver supports synchronized multi-channel PWM with center-aligned mode, duty array updates, dead-time handling, and group start/stop. It is the explicit migration target from IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl and is available in the template.

runtime_function.name: updateGtmTom3phInvDuty
runtime_function.purpose: Apply synchronous duty updates for phases U, V, W at each 500 ms tick using the specified wrap rule.

api_changes.reason: Unified multi-channel duty update API for synchronous updates
Mode/polarity/dead-time are part of the unified config and dead-time can be adjusted with a dedicated API
Clock guard per requirement using available APIs

migration_notes.context_preserved: The solution uses IfxGtm_Pwm to realize center-aligned complementary PWM on TOM1 TGC1 with 1 us dead-time, synchronous start/update, and the specified initial duties and 10% update step. GTM enable/FXCLK guard is implemented with IfxGtm_isEnabled/IfxGtm_enable and IfxGtm_Cmu_enableClocks. Pin routing is handled by the TC38x_516 pin map API. The empty IfxGtm_periodEventFunction is retained, and an ATOM0 CH0 ISR toggling P13.0 at 2 Hz is added using GTM ATOM low-level APIs and IfxPort_togglePin. Note: The requested pins (P02.0/1/2/4/5/7) could not be validated for TOM1 TGC1 on the 516-pin package; verify with IfxGtm_PinMap_TC38x_516 and adjust channel-to-pin routing if necessary to ensure TOM1 Cluster_1 channels (8..13) are used while keeping the user’s pin intent where feasible.

PWM.rationale: Driver locked by refiner node (user explicit or engine-scored)
